summary: This bundle records deterministic proof that `cautilus eval test --runtime fixture` runs the normal eval-test packet path while selecting adapter-owned fixture results instead of a coding-agent backend.

evidenceScope.claimBoundary: Only the README claim that the fixture runtime can prove command routing and packet evaluation through the eval-test path without launching a nested model eval is marked satisfied.
notClaimed: Fixture runtime proves live model, app, or product-runner behavior
Every adapter has a fixture backend configured
All eval presets have equivalent live-runtime coverage
Fixture smoke is a replacement for held-out behavior evaluation

commandEvidence.reason: The focused CLI test now passes `--runtime fixture`, requires the adapter command to receive the fixture backend, and asserts that eval-observed proof metadata records runtime=fixture, proofClass=fixture-smoke, and proofClassSource=runtime.

The checked-in self-dogfood dev/skill adapter ran the eval-test path with `--backend fixture` and `--fixture-results-file fixtures/eval/dev/skill/internal-runner-fixture-results.json`, then emitted accept-now eval packets.

decision.reason: The focused test and live self-dogfood fixture run both show the normal eval-test path producing eval-cases, eval-observed, and eval-summary packets while routing the adapter-owned runner through the fixture backend.
